Welcome

Add your introduction here. Use standard markdown – headings, paragraphs, lists, and inline code all work out of the box.

What’s in these docs

Use this section to give readers a quick overview of what the documentation covers. You can link directly to sections in the sidebar:

  • Elements – accordion, tabs, notices, tables, and more
  • Content – images, video, and tooltips
  • Layouts – full-width, sidebar, and banner variants
  • Reference – footnotes and interface tour

Getting started

Replace this section with your own quick-start steps. Markdown lists, numbered steps, and code blocks all work:

  1. Step one – describe it here
  2. Step two – describe it here
  3. Step three – describe it here

Note: For special components like accordions, lightboxes, or hotspots, copy the HTML snippets from _TEMPLATE.md and paste them directly into any doc page. </div>

</article>

A peer-mentoring initiative empowering underrepresented digital Research Technical Professionals to step into leadership.
